name: falloff_drag
description: Reference-parity: per-vertex WEIGHTED single-axis transform (linear falloff), move/scale/rotate. The gradient was RECOVERED from the captured weighting and re-expressed as vibe3d-native start/end handles, so vibe3d's weighted transform reproduces the frozen reference verts independent of the reference engine's internal falloff-axis convention.

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
